title: Effective date of merger, consolidation and transfer of functions; appropriations; termination; Mississippi River Bridge Authority; Crescent City Connection Division
doc_html:
§1167.1.  Effective date of merger, consolidation and transfer of functions; appropriations; termination; Mississippi River Bridge Authority; Crescent City Connection Division

The merger, consolidation and transfer of functions provided for by this Part shall take effect and become operative on January 1, 2013.

Acts 2012, No. 866, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2013.
